title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iGate India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iGate India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
iGate India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
